one_liner: Modern CRM platform with comprehensive REST API, OAuth 2.0/API key authentication, free tier access, and an official MCP server already available.

auth_methods.notes: Standard OAuth 2.0 authorization code flow. Recommended for apps serving multiple workspaces. Scopes configured via developer dashboard.
Single-workspace access tokens generated via app developer settings. Suitable for apps targeting a single workspace. Scopes specified during token generation and can be modified on existing tokens.
HTTP Basic Authentication is technically supported (username is token, password blank) but Bearer authentication is recommended.

self_serve_notes: Attio offers a self-serve free tier with API access included. Users can sign up directly on the website without a credit card. API is subject to rate limits on the free tier.

api_surface.notes: Comprehensive REST API with support for CRM operations including people, companies, deals, lists, tasks, and notes. Also offers OAuth 2.0, webhooks, and an App SDK for building integrations.

evidence.supports: OAuth 2.0 and API key authentication methods with Bearer token usage
REST API availability and comprehensive documentation
Developer platform with OAuth 2.0, REST API, webhooks, and App SDK
Self-serve free tier with API access included
Free tier available without credit card requirement
Official hosted MCP server with OAuth authentication
